title: Indulgent Slovakian Cheese Burger
description: A rich, adventurous burger featuring Yuzu-cured beef, creamy condensed milk, and a velvety cheese pull.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: 80/20 lean to fat ratio for optimal juiciness

ingredients.name: Condensed Milk
ingredients.notes: Evaporated milk will not provide the same creamy texture

ingredients.name: Yuzu Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a more vibrant flavor

ingredients.name: Cottage Cheese
ingredients.notes: High-protein cottage cheese for added depth

ingredients.name: Slovakian Sesame Seed Buns
ingredients.notes: Soft, fluffy buns for the ultimate burger experience

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat (175°C/350°F).
Form 4 patties from the ground beef, about 115g each.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place the patties onto the preheated grill and cook for 4 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 63°C/145°F.
Meanwhile, mix the cottage cheese with breadcrumbs and egg in a bowl until well combined.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture onto the bottom bun, followed by a cooked patty, a dollop of condensed milk, and a sprinkle of Yuzu zest.
Finish with a slice of cheddar cheese and top with the remaining bun.
Repeat for the remaining patties and serve immediately.
